constraints.name: muon g-2 (BNL+FNAL combined)
constraints.notes: Combined BNL E821 + FNAL Run-1 result

constraints.name: LHC Z' dimuon search (ATLAS)
constraints.notes: 95% CL upper limit on sigma*BR as function of M_Zp; the CSV asset is already available locally, and hep-numerics can pair it with a dedicated external rate implementation.

computed_by.note: Uses a dedicated dimuon production-rate module outside the current calc-tasks list; the experimental limit itself is supplied by the local interpolation asset.

constraints.name: neutrino trident production
constraints.notes: sigma(nu_mu N -> nu_mu mu+ mu- N) / sigma_SM < 1.7; kept as recorded-only until a dedicated trident evaluator is bundled into the current workflow.

computed_by.note: Requires dedicated trident cross-section calculation not currently bundled into the workflow.

constraints.name: LEP Z' contact interaction bounds
constraints.notes: Recast required; bound depends on model-specific assumptions about Z' couplings to electrons
